description: Create a fully-constrained 6-sided 2D profile of a cantilever snap-fit hook and extrude it to an 8 mm width. The profile is a closed polygon with the following segments: a vertical root edge from (0,0) to (0,2), a horizontal top edge to (18,2), a vertical catch edge to (18,3.5), a sloped lead-in edge to (22,2), a vertical tip edge to (22,0), and a horizontal bottom edge returning to the origin. Apply horizontal, vertical, and length constraints (Bottom: 22 mm, Root: 2 mm, Top: 18 mm, Catch: 1.5 mm, Tip: 2 mm) to fully define the sketch. Save the SolveSpace file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/snap_fit_hook.slvs and export the STL mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/snap_fit_hook.stl.
